verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For the weapons of our warfare are not carnal, But they are mighty, yes, they are mighty! For the weapons of our warfare are not carnal, But they are mighty through the Holy Ghost.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For they are strong through the pulling down of strongholds, And they are mighty, yes, they are mighty! For they are strong through the pulling down of strongholds, And they are mighty through the Holy Ghost.
